title: Drum’s Fear Begins to Break
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on drum’s fear begins to break, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Drum’s Fear Begins to Break. Wapol loses control of the castle and the people’s fear as Luffy, Chopper, and the others push the tyrant back. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: How dare you defile my weapon! Don't you realize you're dealing with the King of Drum Island?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't care if you're a king or a god, that's got nothing to do with this...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter how great or low you are either!

summary: This part highlights drum’s fear begins to break and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
